title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 AMDALAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY POBLACION, GUINA-ANG, MUNICIPALITY OF PASIL, PROVINCE OF KALINGA FROM THE PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CENTRAL PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6581; 109 OG No. 29, 5004 (July 22, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10475, April 16, 2013 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 AMDALAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY POBLACION, GUINA-ANG, MUNICIPALITY OF PASIL, PROVINCE OF KALINGA FROM THE PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CENTRAL PASIL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聯 The Pasil National High School 芒聙聯 Amdalao National High School Annex in Barangay Poblacion, Guina-ang, Municipality of Pasil, Province of Kalinga is hereby separated from the Pasil National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Central Pasil National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聯 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Pasil National High School 芒聙聯 Amdalao National High School Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Central Pasil National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the operationalization of the Central Pasil National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriations of the Pasil National High School 芒聙聯 Amdalao National High School Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聯 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 15, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 16 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
